title: narcissus citrinus
intro: Narcissus citrinus, also known as the yellow daffodil or trumpet daffodil, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Narcissus. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani practices, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as treating respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a natural remedy for digestive problems and pain relief. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being applied topically in the form of creams and ointments.
